name: ⭐Dream Killers
description: Pre-TCD mixtape-like comp based on Ye's gangsta rap songs from when he just got signed to Roc and on the 2002-2003 tracklists from Jeen-Yuhs. Contains remasters to make the songs more cohesive and higher quality.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name:
Freshmen Year
Remastered
description: Remastered versions of almost all of Kanye's pre-TCD mixtape songs.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: ⭐Most Unlikely To Succeed
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name:
The College Dropout
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release The College Dropout.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name:
✨The Good, The Bad & The Ugly
(The Magnificent 2.0) (with Common & Consequence)
description: Reimagined collab record between Kanye, Common and Consequence set in 2006 after they've released their respective acclaimed projects, using non-album songs from around the era and adding any missing artist from a song. Alt version has no added verses to preserve overall vocal quality.
creator: darkTwist, hatw & r.beatz

name: ⭐Sorry, Mr. West Is Gone
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name:
Late Registration
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release Late Registration.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: ⭐Late Orchestration
description: Remastered version of the live album Late Orchestration, with crowd vocals removed and improved mixing.
creator: Orpheus

name:
⭐Graduation
Reworked
description: Graduation with new orchestral elements and synths to give it a grander feel.
creator: ahmed2.0_

name: Graduation - Rising Stars
description: Comp consisting of edits from the creator and BSB Dante's and yak's respective comps. Has songs from the album along with tracks Kanye put out in mixtapes as well as features, all incorporated into a new shuffled tracklist.
creator:
paranoid.eyesore
(a.k.a. per5on4)

name: Homecoming
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name:
Graduation
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release Graduation.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name:
⭐808s & Heartbreak
(Rework)
description: 808s comp merging the original's electronic style with orchestral elements inspired by the VH1 Storytellers and Hollywood Bowl performances.
creator: Akimbo

name:
Heartbreak
V2
description: 808s rework that leans onto a somber and colder sound, focusing on the realistic aspects of heartbreak from a failed relationship through added production, voice message skits and a stripped back tracklist.
creator: Jax

name: Welcome To Heartbreak
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name:
808s & Heartbreak
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release 808s & Heartbreak.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: Child Rebel Soldier
description: Comp envisioning a full Child Rebel Soldier album released in 2013, containing various released and unreleased tracks from each artist.
creator:
Reborn Sinner & victor
^ (a.k.a. Forbidden Sinner)

name: ⭐Child Rebel Soldier
description: Era-accurate imagining of a short mixtape released by the Child Rebel Soldier supergroup. Contains tweaked versions of the released CRS songs as well as added verses from the three members over completely new beats.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: God Unwilling
description: Non-accurate CRS comp containing 3 parts with songs from the 3 artists and added vocals where necessary. Has aged well aside from some exceptions.
creator: BSB Dante

name: ⭐Good Ass Job
description: Community comp envisioning what GAJ would sound like if it were a B-side to MBDTF and as release ready as possible while still being creative.
creator: The Pastelle Collective

name: Winter-Spring-Summer-Fall
description: GAJ comp with a tracklist based on the WSSF concept and personal edits with some Pastelle parts, albeit with alternative takes on them.
creator: jason

name: g00d a$$ Job
description: GAJ rework imagining a synthy pop-inspired record released in early 2010. Has a balanced track selection of MBDTF album track edits implementing various demo elements and LP5 scraps often associated with the GAJ era.
creator: IcyEdits

name: The 4 Seasons: W.S.S.F
description: B Side to "Good Ass Job", with a much more melodic direction that mashes the pop, synthy sound of Graduation and the soul sample sound of TCD that the prequel comp had utilised but presented in a much more grounded way.
creator: Santino

name: Good Ass Job
description: GAJ comp utilizing the more unique tracks of the era, whether they are the well-known, defining ones or more obscure picks, such as features or from leaked beats. All of the songs have been reworked with new vocals and a merge of the production styles found on Graduation and MBDTF.
creator: Santino

name: Winter Spring Summer Fall
description: Comp set in late 2009 where the VMAs incident never happened, featuring unheard and/or more obscure songs from 808s-GAJ-MBDTF eras, edited in a laidback, simplistic style without much reworking or maximallism.
creator: ApeHard

name:
🌟Good Ass Job
V2
description: Collection of tracks remastered and restructured with little added prod or reimaginings. The best way to listen to the leaks/OG LP5 songs.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name:
Good Foot Job
The Director's Cut
description: Alternative take on the comp above. Fleshes out and experiments with the lesser known demos of the era by adding verses or production changes that adhere to the original leaks. Please, ignore the stupid name and cover.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name:
Good Ass Job
V2
description: Classic GAJ comp with minimal MBDTF overlap and a few G.O.O.D. Fridays tracks. Songs have been restructured, and in a few cases reworked, to make an accurate imagining of the album that still retains listenability and quality.
creator:
Ivory
(a.k.a. Ivy & casual)

name:
Good Ass Job
4.19.10
description: Somewhat simple GAJ comp that adds verses and features to nearly every beat from the demo beat copy along with some more obscure LP5 beats.
creator: biob

name: ⭐My Beautiful Dark Twisted Symphony
description: 5 songs from Kanye's magnum opus with new string arrangements meant to enhance the listening experience and offer a more cinematic atmosphere to Kanye West's most lavish project to date.
creator: quent.in

name:
🌟My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy
(Mike Dean Live Inspired)
description: MBDTF comp that makes the original album experience even grander with new synths and production inspired by Mike Dean's live production.
creator: Harley Banks

name:
My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy
(Extended)
description: Extended MBDTF comp, utilizing the recordforhype.zip interlude tracks as well as added G.O.O.D. Friday songs, scrapped features, sample intros/outros and restructures to make the songs feel grander.
creator: JonJeffJonJon

name: Hell Of A Life
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name: Good Ass Job
description: Classic LP5 comp based on the Donda's Boy rumor, with every song drawn out with intros, outros and scrapped/remix features to all be 10 minutes long. Has an hour long Runaway bonus stringed from different live performances.
creator: 88888u

name:
My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name:
G.O.O.D. Fridays
(Remastered)
description: Remastered version of the GF 2010 singles.
creator: Chropic

name:
✨Good Kid, Twisted Fantasy
(with Kendrick Lamar)
description: Mashup album of MBDTF and GKMC. Got covered by multiple news outlets and even a reaction from Anthony Fantano. Sequel to 2049.
creator: Toasty Digital

name: The Throne
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name: ⭐Return Of The Throne
description: Comp imagining a realistic sequel to WTT released in 2013. Focused more on sonics similar to JAY-Z’s Magna Carta…Holy Grail album, featuring reworks and recreations of tracks from there as well as of WTT era tracks.
creator: Reborn Sinner

name:
Watch The Throne
Remastered
description: Remastered Version of release Watch The Throne.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: ✨Seasonal Affective Disorder
description: EDM-inspired Cruel Summer rework. Based off the original tracklist, but with a couple songs removed and a couple from the era added. Songs range from the original songs with extra keys to actual entirely different instrumentals.
creator: GHOSTWLKAR

name: ⭐Thank God For Drugs
description: Extensive LP6 comp covering almost everything known about in the eras, with new production based on the album tracks' demos, as well as extended and reworked leaks. Considered a timeless comp amongst the community.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: Thank God For Drugs
description: Community comp using SJ's version as a backbone while still adding plenty of new production based on the source material and some trap influences. Covers even more content than SJ's due to covering new leaks as well.
creator: Jozzuh & Co.

name:
Thank God For Drugs
Akimbo's Cut
description: Akimbo's personal cut of the main comp, polishing and stripping down most of the tracklist songs. Considered a more accurate rendition of the era.
creator: Akimbo

name: Black American Psycho
description: LP6 comp containing various reworks and recreations of songs based on established and newly surfaced material from the era along with samples from the movie American Psycho inspired by BSB Dante's BAP comp.
creator: Solidus Jack

name:
🌟Lost Yeezus
V2
description: LP6 comp focused on improving and polishing various leaks of the era with as little reworking as possible to preserve their original atmospheric sound. The best way to experience the old and new LP6 leaks in an accurate way.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: Thank God For Drugs
description: Personal LP6 rendition attempting to stay accurate to the more grandiose, scattered electronic style of the earliest demos without adding or overhauling much of the production already present in them and their released versions.
creator: Matsu

name:
Yedits Presents:
Thank God For Drugs
description: 2nd installment in the YP series. Encapsulates the dreamy, maximalist vibe that was thought to be part of the era. Some edits were updated for SimpleJosh's TGFD but its other edits are still worth checking out.
creator: Yedits Presents Team

name: Drugs Made Yeezus
description: Comp acting as a hybrid of the Yeezus album tracks and leaks, merging elements from release, leaks or edits from other people.
creator: Leo

name: ✨Thank God For Drugs
description: Reimagining of LP6 material combined into a comp resembling a prog album. Uses interludes and leitmotifs to make an experience different from Yeezus.
creator: themusicnerdguy
review:
Review - the.g4mbik
Review - Taco
Review - dondhi

name: Thank God For Drugs
description: LP6 comp aiming for an overproduced and scattered feel, whether it be through added/reworked production or complete reimaginings.
creator: paci & bobert

name: ⭐GOD WANTS YOU
description: Complete re-envisioning of Yeezus, warping the album into a horrorcore, experimental collage containing multiple samples from the Twin Peaks show, as well as even more added production that still retains elements of release.
creator: windybro

name:
YEEZUS
REMASTERED
description: Reimagined version of Yeezus to be more detailed, polished, and directed in a new way, incorporating several elements from the OG versions and still preserving the abrasiveness and boldness of the released project.
creator: IcyEdits

name: NOT FOR SALE
description: Yeezus comp with grittier production reminiscent of industrial sounds and different arrangements to make the songs more complete for the editor's liking. Contains all the released songs as well as Awesome and 4444.
creator:
DJ GOTHFUKKER
(a.k.a. REBORNSAINT & sohelpmegod._)

name:
Yeezus
(Extended)
description: Curated Yeezus comp with various QoL changes across the TL as well as merging and incorporating several edits from other LP6 comps.
creator: Soundwave

name: Yeezification
description: Double disc comp with one on Yeezus and the other on Yeezus II (and this one is not very good). Has added alternative production on some aspects of the songs such as drums or synths, but no huge overhauls.
creator: ahmed2.0_

name:
Yeezus
(Extended)
description: Extended Yeezus comp, with added features, leaks and any extra official instrumentation, mostly live, available around the era. Steers somewhat from the original experience sometimes but very extensive otherwise.
creator: JonJeffJonJon

name:
Yeezus
Remastered
description: Remastered Version of release Yeezus.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: Not For Sale
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name: Black American Psycho
description: Very long extension of Yeezus, lasting 2 hours and a half. Much more interesting listen due to the bigger amount of extensions but the quality of these isn't as consistent as Dante's other comps in his extended series.
creator: BSB Dante

name: ✨YESSIAH
description: Reimagining of Yeezus with a variety of production overhauls to build upon the core ideas of the songs or bring them to entirely different directions.
creator: OBELISC

name:
✨YEEZUS
REDEEMED
description: Incredibly unique and experimental remix of most release Yeezus tracks. Contains new production and samples that make for a refreshing LP6 listen.
creator: cres

name: SPECIAL IMPORT
description: Different take on Yeezus, presenting a hybrid of the misc Yeezus-era rap songs and alt takes on traditional Yeezus songs.
creator: Bliss Collective

name: ⭐Cruel Winter
description: Comp envisioning short but finished versions of both the 2013/2014 and 2016/2017 iterations of Cruel Winter, expanding on their respective sounds and including tracks from other closely related eras.
creator: ahmed2.0_ & Co.

name:
Cruel Winter
(2014)
description: 2014 CW tracks with QoL changes and new features/verses to flesh them out into a real G.O.O.D. Music project from the time period.
creator: pablo999

name: SENSATIONAL
description: Y2 comp that aims to be a different take than usual, by adding production, changing structures and a lot of changes that heighten the experience of the era, as well as a very unique Y2 selection of songs with very diverse sounds.
creator: Solidus Jack

name: ⭐Yeezus II
description: Yeezus-length rendition of Y2, covering almost all the aspects presented by songs from the era, now with new production, structures, verses and ideas to make them more polished and release ready.
creator: luwi
review:
Review - Akimbo
Review - TMNG
Review - Taco

name:
Yeezus 2
(hc's Version)
description: Y2 track collection with a heavy emphasis on the early freestyle demos, with these being demumbled, restructured and even including some added production, all while still remaining faithful to the source material.
creator: hc

name: Yeezus II
description: Y2 take that aims to turn it into a project more akin to a commercial album, with a tracklist consisting of a balanced selection of released songs and leaks to represent a more release ready vision of the the era's uniqueness.
creator: windybro

name: ✨Halloween EP
description: Short, classic rework based on the rumored 3 track drop from Kanye in 2014. Surprisingly consistent and still holds up really well.
creator: SimpleJosh

name: Yeezus II
description: One of the most popular classic Y2 comps with a now-outdated selection of tracks to lean heavily on the abrasiveness of our early knowledge of the era.
creator: Oreo Eater

name: Yeezus II: The Lost Chapter
description: Old reimagining of Yeezus 2 as a direct OG version of TLOP, with stripped down prod on some tracks to reflect the minimalism found on Yeezus.
creator: Solidus Jack

name:
✨Yeezus 2
(11.11.13)
description: Short comp of around 5 tracks that aims to make the first copy of Yeezus 2 more enjoyable by restructuring, cutting down, mixing and adding production.
creator: RPPY

name:
So Help Me God
V2
description: Classic and concise comp of just 9 LP7 songs that still mostly hold up today. Home to the incredible FourFiveSeconds rework with industrial production, among other additions expanding on the dark and aggressive reputation that the SHMG era was thought to originally have.
creator: pxblo

name: ✨CHIRAQ
description: Alternate take of LP7 songs (mainly SHMG) with rock influences, soul samples and a LOT of custom-made beatswitches. Not always consistent but very creative. Contains a generational All Day rework.
creator: Yuri

name: ⭐So Help Me God
description: Rework of SHMG built on top of our modern perception of the album, incorporating plenty of new leaks and info from the era, along with many incredible production and feature additions, creating a fresh LP7 experience.
creator: windybro

name: So Help Me God: Angels
description: Community comp consisting of various LP7 songs, with several reproduced elements to make them sound as high quality as possible and some track overhauls sprinkled here and there. Notably broke the old dark reputation the SHMG era had by delivering a more accurate reimagining of the project.
creator: Magik & Co.

name: So Help Me God
description: SHMG rework heavily inspired by pxblo's comp, modernizing and expanding on the concepts of its inspiration. Contains an amazing All Your Fault and a beautiful I Feel Like That. Released with a scrapped SWISH comp.
creator: themusicnerdguy

name: So Help Me God
description: SHMG take focused more on the dark, grimey sonics. Covers LP7 in general like Angels, but is also more updated and grounded in its editing style.
creator: ambitousgoat23

name:
So Help Me God
V3
description: Comp consisting of various LP7 leaks fitting the SHMG era, all remastered and touched up to be as high quality and complete as possible, while still sounding super close to the source material. Currently outdated.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: So Help Me God
description: SHMG take that emulates the feel of a classic and simple comp from 2021, putting aside most new info to make a very well-rounded LP7 experience.
creator: Matsu

name:
So Help Me God
Remastered
description: Collection of remastered LP7 leaks and edits with an emphasis on a more positive and upbringing sound, inspired by the gospel aspect of TLOP.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: ⭐WAVES
description: Rework of SWISH material with new production that incorporates the leaks and provides alternative takes on its TLOP counterpart where applicable. Contains an amazing Forever edit.
creator: Solidus Jack

name:
SWISH
(poofartpoo Edition)
description: Classic SWISH rework with added synths and production to give some TLOP songs a more electronic feel. Home to the strange Africa 30 Hours edit.
creator: poofartpoo

name: SWISH
description: Early SWISH rework with edits of leaks and non-album releases. Not exactly an accurate envisioning of the era but a good alt TLOP experience.
creator: Rose

name: SWISH
description: Polished take of 14 SWISH tracks with new drums, elements from various leaks, changed structures and improvements on mixing.
creator: Akimbo

name:
✨YEFFERY
(with Young Thug)
description: Simple LP7 comp imagining the era as a collab between Kanye and Thug, featuring official songs between them and other songs with added verses.
creator:
HEAT DEATH
(a.k.a. The Biggest Stepper & ezpz)

name:
SWISH
(Fern's Version)
description: 7 track SWISH comp including the more trap-influenced songs from the era.
creator: FernTheHuman

name:
✨THE OVERGROUND HELL ROAD
(with Kendrick Lamar)
description: Ye x Kendrick tape circa 2016. Has a mix of the warm sampley vibe on the latter half of TLOP with the jazzy free instrumentation of untitled unmastered.
creator: themusicnerdguy

era: 808s & Heartbreak: Live At The Hollywood Bowl
name: 808s & Orchestration
description: Maximalist take of 808s using and expanding on the Hollywood Bowl orchestra, further clashing against the original 808s' electric aesthetic. Outdated due to being made before the CDQ leak but is still enjoyable.
creator:
TakaTyphoon
(a.k.a. takiblue)

era: 808s & Heartbreak: Live At The Hollywood Bowl
name:
⭐808s & Heartbreak
Live At The Hollywood Bowl
description: SimpleJosh's take on the CDQ Hollywood Bowl 808s material. Uses the stems to seamlessly include QoL changes across the songs, as well as adding the scrapped Caroline Shaw interludes replacing the performance's interludes and the SWISH versions of Wolves and WISI as bonuses.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

era: 808s & Heartbreak: Live At The Hollywood Bowl
name:
808s & Heartbreak
Live At The Hollywood Bowl
description: Akimbo's CDQ Hollywod Bowl 808s mix. Includes the scrapped Caroline Shaw interludes as well as replacing Pinocchio Story with the edit from his original 808s comp due to it being closer to the performance's version.
creator: Akimbo

era: 808s & Heartbreak: Live At The Hollywood Bowl
name:
808s & Heartbreak
Live At The Hollywood Bowl
description: Fully mixed version of the Hollywood Bowl peformance of 808s & Heartbreak, containing various small QoL changes and improved mixing along with it.
creator: Akimbo

era: 808s & Heartbreak: Live At The Hollywood Bowl
name:
808s & Heartbreak
At The Hollywood Bowl
description: Minimal crowd noises remaster of the Hollywood Bowl 808s performance. Uses Akimbo's Hollywood Bowl 808s remaster as a base for the main tracks.
creator: Orpheus

name: ⭐My God Is Awesome
description: TLOP rework containing added tracks, production and features all coming together to merge the released sound with material from the SWISH era. Great way to experience the LP7 macro-era as a whole.
creator: windybro

name: Ultralight Beam
description: First real attempt at transforming the TLOP era, with an all-new tracklist with LP7 leaks and a select few from released. Has added production on almost all the tracks to create a unique, guitar-influenced hip-hop experience.
creator: JonJeffJonJon

name:
🌟The Life Of Pablo
(Radikal Redux)
description: TLOP comp that selects changes made by BlockaShotya and Dorian Ye and combine them with the creator's own personal edits to create the most optimal TLOP experience as possible. Good balance between the 2 projects.
creator: Jak Radical

name:
The Life Of Pablo
(Extended Edition)
description: Early extended comp that expands on released songs with sample intros/outros, added features and other new instrumental segments. Contains moments such as a Pt. 2 cypher and an extended piano outro on FML.
creator: BlockaShotya

name: The Life Of Paul
description: Early TLOP rework from 2017 that provides alternative versions of each released TLOP songs, albeit with only slight changes like restructure of segments or new intros/outros. One of the most popular classic comps.
creator: Dorian Ye

name: Album Of The Life
description: Collection of TLOP songs, non-album singles and LP7 leaks with minimal changes and extensions to create a complete picture of the time period.
creator: Matsu

name:
The Life Of Pablo
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release The Life of Pablo.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: Saint Pablo
description:
High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
Somewhat redundant due to the other extension TLOP comps.
creator: BSB Dante

name:
✨The Death Of Pablo
+ The Legacy Of Pablo
description: Fan album taking snippets of TLOP to distort and transform them beyond recognition into a noisy, haunting reimagining of the album inspired by a 4chan user's nightmare. Gained notoriety from being reviewed by various music publications. Received a sequel called The Legacy Of Pablo.
creator: The Pablo Collective

name: ⭐Cruel Winter
description: Comp envisioning short but finished versions of both the 2013/2014 and 2016/2017 iterations of Cruel Winter, expanding on their respective sounds and including tracks from other closely related eras.
creator: ahmed2.0_ & Co.

name:
Cruel Winter
(2017)
description: Collection of polished edits surrounding the CW era and its G.O.O.D. Music signees. Released alongside a Blobama comp.
creator: SimpleJosh

name: Cruel Winter
description: Early CW comp featuring known tracks from the era and other songs by or with G.O.O.D. Music signees of the time period, adding some features throughout to make it feel more crowded, like a true label compilation album.
creator: Batby

name:
TurboGrafx16
(poofartpoo Edition)
description: Overhaul of TG16 songs and other LP7 tracks with a heavy emphasis on futuristic synths and electronic-trap noises, with various video game samples sprinkled throughout to make for a fun experience.
creator: poofartpoo

name: ⭐ULTRA!
description: Modern TG16 compilation expanding on the ideas presented by both SimpleJosh's TG16: Indigo Sound and Minerva's own PC Engine comps. Contains new reproductions, drums, synth usage and vocal features. Currently the best, most consistent TG16 rework.
creator: Minerva

name: TurboGrafx16: Indigo Sound
description: The first fully fleshed out TG16 rework, compiling together rumored tracks with amazing-flowing tracklist and fulfilling album experience that preserves the core sound of the original tracks. The definitive TG16 experience.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: TurboGrafx16: Zulu
description: TG16 comp heavily inspired by Keyon Christ's production and Indigo Sound, seamlessly incorporating synths, drums, bass, and other elements to create a distinct mix of analog and organic sounds unique to this comp.
creator: lilac

name: Turbo Grafx 16
description: Synth-heavy rework of various TG16 and other closely tied LP7 tracks.
creator: windybro

name: ✨Graveyard
description: Short rework of songs from the Graveyard rumor with TG16-style production.
creator: YeezyJointz

name: ✨3A-TG16
description: Comp of TG16 songs and rumored tracks with completely new futuristic original instrumentals, resembling little to none of its original variants.
creator: trip3a

name: ⭐Wolves
description: Imagining of a collab album by Kanye West and Drake dropped in 2018. Includes the leaked Wolves beats as well as miscellaneous material from the Wyoming sessions, merging the sampley beats with an electronic sound.
creator: bobert & Co.

name: ✨For All The Wolves
description: Mashup comp with new production aiming to make a fully fledged Kanye / Drake album. Not fully era accurate, although amazingly well made. Said to have broken the "Wolves Curse".
creator: Adn80

name:
✨Metta World Peace
(with Bon Iver)
description: Imagining of a short collab between Kanye and Bon Iver made during the 2017-2018 Wyoming sessions, using scraps from ye and LOVE EVERYONE as well as released iMi songs and other Bon Iver material from 2018. Contains added verses from Kanye and other features where necessary.
creator: creeptheme

name:
Yedits Presents:
Love Everyone
description: 4th installment of the YP series. Has several beat overhauls, song recreations and new verses/features spread across 20+ tracks by several top editors at the time. Contains an amazing SimBap rework but otherwise can be a bit bloated and questionable at times.
creator: Yedits Presents Team

name: ⭐Love Everyone: Spirits
description: Classic rework of LE with a mixture of slight tweaks and total song overhauls, containing stripped down and reordered elements to make a seamless experience that leans on the barebones, slight horrorcore aspect of the era.
creator: Default_Miserable

name: Love Everyone
description: LE comp focusing on the spiritual songs along with the empathetic songs that actually fit the title LE but also the most psychedelic sounding songs. Very cohesive sounding and has no mumble other than 1 song.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: Love Everyone
description: Personal LE comp designed to be minimalistic to drive home the messages and thoughts Kanye had brewed up during this era. Contains a brilliant stripped back Violent Crimes edit that gives more weight to Chance's verse.
creator: caroline

name: Love Everyone
description: 7-track comp imagining what a version of Love Everyone from before the TMZ rant. Contains QoL improvements as well as minimal additions resulting in recreations of well-known, yet usually untouched ideas of the era.
creator: louiebag

name: Peace & Love
description: LE comp based on making a sample-rich, warm, and ornate environment, reworking tracks from the era and the other Wyoming albums.
creator: themusicnerdguy

name:
🌟Graveyard
(1st Anniversary Edition)
description: Wyoming era comp centered around a merge dark vibes with fun sampley elements like its LE counterpart, Peace & Love. Very cinematic and unique experience that best mimics the sampley trait of the Wyoming eras.
creator: themusicnerdguy

name:
⭐Omari
(Deluxe)
description: Incredible Wyoming era comp containing outstanding edits with production overhauls, added features and more. A full expression of what ye could have been if it went in a much more maximallist route. Despite being updated with new bonuses and different mixing, some people might prefer V1.
creator: Lionel Scott

name: Love.
description: Personal LP8 cut that serves as an alt Omari experience by including several edits directly or derived from the above comp with audio tweaks throughout.
creator: Akimbo

name: Thirty Mile Zone
description: Comp using the 21/05/2018 ye tracklist with every song on it being reworked with added production and verses, creating a fun alternative ye LP.
creator: chang0099

name: ye
description: Classic ye comp infamous for the "Ghost Town/Violent Crimes but it will make you ascend to the 4th dimension" edits on YouTube with heavy usage of synths, samples, live performances and a complete overhaul in vibe for the 2 last songs of the album. Might, just might, be a product of its time.
creator: JonJeffJonJon

name:
ye
(Mike Dean Inspired Edit)
description: Complete rework of ye that adds Mike Dean-like synths to each song, giving the usually short album a much more atmospheric and fulfilling feel.
creator: Harley Banks

name: All That Matters
description: Megamix of LP8 material with edits that don't break out of the original sound. Very good way to know the macro-era at ground level.
creator: Matsu

name: In The Sunken Place
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era. Contains both ye and KSG material.
creator: BSB Dante

name:
ye
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release ye.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name:
Wyoming
Remastered
description: Collection of remastered songs which had Kanye's involvement in, either as Kanye's own songs, feature or production credits.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: Wyoming Love
description: Extensive overhaul of Wyoming material with new beats as well as added production to existing song. Inconsistent at times but otherwise a great effort.
creator: LuCas

name: In The Sunken Place
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era. Contains both ye and KSG material.
creator: BSB Dante

name: ⭐Kids See Ghosts 2
description: Fantastic comp imagining a second Kids See Ghosts album. Backed up by amazing instrumentals though verse selection maybe off in some places.
creator: razacosmica

name:
Kids See Ghosts
Remastered
description: Remastered version of release Kids See Ghosts.
creator: u/fosterlynch

name: ⭐Job Well Done
description: The first fully fledged out rework of this often ignored era, recreating and expanding on the material we have from it and other early Yandhi songs, adding production, verses and restructures where needed.
creator: Acid Collective

name: Good Ass Job
description: Old and short 8 track rework of GAJ18 songs or Chance-related 2018 songs. Simple, but neat and very high-quality.
creator: neon.abom

name: Job Well Done
description: Comp editing recent GAJ18 leaks to build onto the Kanye & Chance album from the Wyoming sessions concept.
creator: x3mili

name: Job Well Done
description: Short 7-track GAJ18 comp featuring the well-known songs from the era with new added Ye verses and 2 additional Chance songs.
creator: cool_gamez

name:
⭐Grandhi
V2
description: Grand envisioning of Yandhi with new production, added verses and complete overhauls to make every track maximalist and packed to the fullest.
creator: ahmed2.0_

name: ✨SpaceX
description: Space-themed Yandhi comp by JonJeffJonJon. Filled with luscious synths, rearrangements and other reworked elements.
creator: JonJeffJonJon

name:
Yandhi
(Minerva's Edition)
description: Yandhi rework that attempts to experiment more with the era as a whole, maximizing Kanye's presence on the songs, varying up the structure to not feel repetitive and adding snappier sounding production.
creator:
Minerva
(a.k.a. isabtoddler)

name: Yandhi
description: Yandhi rework aiming to create a polished finished project out of the known Yandhi material, making QoL and production changes where necessary. One of the best, most focused Yandhi comps in recent time.
creator: The NARCISSIST Team

name: Yandhi
description: Lionel's personal Yandhi comp. Heavily influenced by the NARCISSIST Team's comp while incorporating his style to the edits he made or changed.
creator: Lionel Scott

name: Yandhi
description: Rework of Yandhi tracks with added new samples, production and features. Can be a bit wild and overproduced sometimes but makes for a fun listening.
creator: LuCas

name:
Yandhi
Harley Banks Rework (Radikal Redux)
description: Jak Radikal's redux of Harley Banks' classic Yandhi rework. Polished and updated with structure changes, added features, audio remasters and more. Very complete experience that covers all the aspects of the LP9 eras.
creator: Jak Radical

name:
Yandhi
Harley Banks Rework
description: Comp that served as the base for the above. Has many added instruments and standardized what a rework is. Has become somewhat outdated though.
creator: Harley Banks

name:
🌟Yandhi
Revised Edition
description: Comp containing a balance of complete and purist edits of each song. Has transitions and a clear consistent theme. One of the most downloaded comps ever and and a good way to listen to a finished and accurate Yandhi.
creator: CentralDogma

name:
Yandhi
CentralDogma Rework
description: Yandhi rework aiming to capture the vibe of the leaks and have the cleanest mixing possible. Some of the edits are based on Revised Edition's.
creator: CentralDogma

name: Black Friday
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and any extra official elements available around the era.
creator: BSB Dante

name:
Yandhi
Definitive Deluxe Edition
description: Partially outdated 2020-2021 Yandhi comp. Contains a selection of edits from that time, with some reused or derived from BSB Dante's Black Friday comp.
creator: slothinthebroth

name: YandhAI
description: Yandhi comp with re-recorded and finished lyrics performed by djkvoop and ran through an AI filter based on various Kanye acapellas of the era.
creator: djkcoop

name: ⭐Voyager2
description: YaV2-based comp, using nearly none of the typical YaV1 tracks. Has many wild additions in production, structures and features. Doesn't necessarily represent the LP9 eras accurately but it's still a very fun project.
creator: Aurora Team

name:
Yandhi
ReSpin
description: Comp aiming to rework a variety of tracks made in 2018-2019, conveying a different experience to the usual Yandhi comps. Great balance between the well-known Yandhi songs and some more obscure YaV2 ones.
creator:
ChloeBlossom
(a.k.a. branchless & vynyllia)

name: Timbyeland
description: Very early JonJeffJonJon comp that attempts to reconstruct the Timbaland-produced material. There's no huge reworks (specially no Jon synths...) but there's still some applaudable attempts on here though.
creator: JonJeffJonJon

name: ✨Yandhi Is King
description: Yandhi comp combining the best of both Yandhi and JIK. Kind of did not age well due to the resources at the time but still a very commendable effort.
creator: u/msszero159

name:
⭐Yedits Presents:
Jesus Is King
description: 3rd installment in the YP series. Contains much grander and cinematic production, topped off with new features. Despite some aspects showing their age, it still holds up greatly and is considered the definitive JIK rework.
creator: Yedits Presents Team

name:
Jesus Is King
EP
description: EP-length JIK comp based on the work made for a cancelled, much bigger community comp. Contains a few edits expanding on songs of the era while maintaining the minimal, organic sound of the released project.
creator:
bianca.wav & Minerva
(a.k.a. isabtoddler) ^

name:
🌟Jesus Is King
(Rework)
description: Edits of songs from the JIK era to touch up leaks and released songs to make them fuller and more complete, creating a more cohesive album experience while keeping it realistic to what Kanye could have made.
creator: Akimbo

name: ✨worship
description: Minimalist JIK rework inspired by Pi'erre Bourne's style of production. Contains some fitting Yandhi and Donda material as well as restructures.
creator: herqi

name: Jesus Is Lord
description: High quality BSB Dante extension, with sample showcases, added non-album tracks and extra official instrumentation available around the era. Home to the infamous Dua Lipa On God edit that still holds up to this day.
creator: BSB Dante

name: SAVED
description: Classic JIK rework with added tracks, instruments and many other elements. A truly standout comp, though a bit worn out throughout time.
creator: Harley Banks

name: Jesus Is Born!
description: JIK comp aiming to create a proper rework of the era with added production, verses and mixing tweaks to turn the project into a great album.
creator: themusicnerdguy & caroline

name: Our King Jesus
description: JIK comp leaning towards a grander feel, mostly by including elements from alt versions of the songs and SSC performances interwoven into the tracks.
creator: Matsu

name: ✨Jesu Is King
description: Scratched up JIK remix vinyl that includes album tracks, leaks from the era and some songs that just fit the vibe. "Era inaccurate, glory immaculate."
creator: jœ

era: JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version
name: ⭐Jesus Is King: The Dr. Dre Version
description: All JIIK stuff in either highest available quality or upsampled. No production edits, just upsamples. Made with a new upsampling model that works much better than the past ones. Upsamples were done by ._burner.
creator: ._burner

era: JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version
name: Jesus Is King PII
description: 14 track JIK 2 comp full of conceptual Dr. Dre-inspired remixes to bring JIK 2 closer to a final product. Probably not better than the leaked album though.
creator: CentralDogma

name:
⭐God's Country
(v2.0)
description: Aims to create what a finished GC album would have sounded like if it was released in 2020, albeit with some of Lionel's unique touches. Every song has been reworked from their original versions. Released with stems.
creator: Lionel Scott

name: God's Country
description: GC community comp with production, structure and general vibe changes across every track, forming a well-rounded experience for this unfinished era. Based on Lionel's work as it was originally envisioned as his third GC comp.
creator: The NARCISSIST Team

name: God's Country
description: GC comp with a choir-heavy soundscape with a lot of dark sonics. Made to be listened from start to finish, due to containing lead ups and transitions to each other. One of the most slept on and underrated GC comps ever.
creator: Daystar

name:
God's Country
(Jeen's Edition)
description: Short God's Country comp that aims to overhaul or recreate tracks to create an optimal listening experience. Outdated but still good.
creator:
Jeen
(a.k.a. augurio)

name:
🌟God's Country
V3
description: GC comp centered upon QoL changes, minor production improvements several mixing and mastering tweaks to create the most complete yet realistic and release-ready GC album as possible.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: Welcome To God's Kingdom
description: Extensive GC rework led by LuCas with collaborations from editors in the community. Contains very expansive and complete reworks for each song.
creator: LuCas

name:
✨Wash Us In The Blood
(with Travis Scott)
description: Imagining of an early 2021 Ye & Trav project. Aims to capture the dark and psychedelic sounds of both Utopia and GC, using tracks from both artists.
creator: Dom

name: R God's Country
description: Classic recreation of God's Country. One of the first GC reworks ever made.
creator: Ringbert

name: God's Country: Follow Me
description: 16 track GC comp attempting to be a complete rework combining styles from each of the editors while still being true to the vision for the scrapped album. Creative but has lots of misses.
creator: Pekka, Sticky, Fshadow, EndriBaku, and herqi

name: ⭐Donda: With Child
description: DWC rework focused a lot more on adding new production and samples that further elevate the songs with fully up-to-date edits and a track selection based on the New Years Day tracklist.
creator:
ChloeBlossom
(a.k.a. branchless & vynyllia)

name:
Donda: With Child
CentralDogma Rework
description: Classic rework of DWC using leaks assembled into one cohesive experience. Features edits from members of the community and many original edits. Despite having some outdated edits, it still holds up extremely well.
creator: CentralDogma

name: Donda: With Child
description: Aleks' maximalist vision for DWC that reworks almost all the era's main material, heavily weighing on the positive and religious vibes of the era.
creator:
KS ♱
(a.k.a. Aleks ♱)

name: Future Sounds
description: DWC comp with a theme of personal rapping and soulful singing on futuristic beats with snappy drums. Contains a beautiful Run It Up edit.
creator: djtech42

name:
🌟Donda: With Child
(Rework)
description: Cohesive DWC comp that envisions release ready versions of songs in the form of many amazing edits with restructures and remasters without huge reworking nor original production, forming a great and focused compilation.
creator: Akimbo

name: Donda: With Child
description: Envisioning of a finished DWC with expanded instrumentals, restructures and added verses to make the atmosphere more lush and colorful.
creator: themusicnerdguy

name: Donda: With Child
description: Short and polished DWC comp with minimal edits, based on Kanye's psychotic bipolar vibe from the era.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: Donda: With Child
description: Personal DWC comp filled with original edits, leaks and other people's edits. Very extensive and reflects the era accurately without huge reworks.
creator: NotJarrett

name: ⭐Spirits Over The Horizon
description: Extensive rework of the SOTH "era". Notably done in a 3 week time period and being outstanding production wise. Created based around the vibe of the piano freestyles and the sound of the Donda album track demos.
creator: TommyWiseau

name: Donda: Flipside
description: Classic Dv2 rework envisioning what the era what was thought to be before the newer leaks. Merges the more upbeat instruments found in demos of the era with release's finished elements. Contains a great HIII WYD edit.
creator: luwi

name:
Dear Donda
V2
description: Dv2 comp with a mix of the material exclusive to the era or that would go on to be included in the released album. Probably the most balanced listen if you want to hear both the older and newly leaked stuff.
creator: windybro

name:
🌟Orphan
V2
description: Dv2 comp focusing on improving rough freestyles with demumbling, restructuring production expanding on the piano-infused demos and more. The most up-to-date Dv2 comp with all the latest material.
creator: Akimbo

name: The Seraphim
description: Comp polishing leaks from the Dv2 era without too much reworking. Made in under 7 days as a challenge. Contains an amazing LOTP edit that's been used a base for many other edits of the song.
creator:
Ivory
(a.k.a. Ivy & casual)

name: Spirits Over The Horizon
description: Akimbo's previous Dv2 comp. Contains a tracklist based on the Burrito Lovers folder and edits focusing more on Dem Jointz's production. Also has a focus on demumbles and restructures but to a lesser degree than Orphan.
creator: Akimbo

name:
Donda: Sing You Heart Out
(EP)
description: Very short comp of only the singing tracks from the era, mostly centered around the piano insts and finished with no mumble or AI.
creator: Nacio

name: ✨Spirits Over The Horizon
description: Complete rework of song instrumentals similar to 3A-TG16. Kinda inconsistent in quality but very commendable effort nonetheless.
creator: TheDude & trip3a

name: ⭐Spirit Of Donda
description: Donda comp with some DWC songs sprinkled in, filled with amazing reworks (mostly trap-inspired) to create a fresh and sharper version of what we have, opposite of the usual soulful, slow-simmering atmosphere of the era. Much more scattered compared to the usual Donda comps.
creator: ahmed2.0_

name:
Donda
(Arcxne Edition)
description: Donda overhaul with a plethora of new production based on alt versions of songs and a lot of added samples from Kanye's past discography to flesh out the album and give it the climatic soul we expected from the released album.
creator: Arcxne

name:
Donda
(uhhjulian Edition)
description: uhhjulian's Donda rework that adds new production and features that don't stray away too far from the released project's material. Contains an iconic Heaven and Hell edit with the Future Sounds beatswitch.
creator: uhhjulian

name:
Donda
(Allison Fleischer Edit)
description: Donda comp featuring reworked beats with added electronic-influenced production, verses and a shuffled tracklist. Very condensed and focused.
creator: Allison Fleischer

name: Donda: Miracles
description: One of the first successful community comps aside from YP. Contains edits from many members of the community to improve the state of Donda by adding, changing and removing various tracks and elements.
creator: Magik & Co.

name: Donda: Spirits Won't Die
description: Classic Jon comp that contains different instrumental reworks of Donda songs. Notably contains a great Where Do We Go edit.
creator: JonJeffJonJon

name:
🌟Donda
Ojivolta
description: Donda comp based on soulful singing, the sound of the Dv2 era and Ojivolta's stark, warped production. An interesting take on the era that is simple (haha get it) but very effective as an alternative Donda experience.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: Donda
description: Comp based on the released version of Donda that (almost) exclusively uses elements officially made for the songs at some point for an focused and improved, yet realistic envisioning to what Kanye could have made.
creator: Akimbo

name:
Donda
(Uncensored)
description: Comp that uncensors the released album using better, up-to-date resources. Served as the base for Akimbo's personal Donda comp above.
creator: Akimbo

name:
Donda
Endless Edition
description: Donda material selected and merged to create a lengthy, cinematic experience. Heavily inspired by the work of BSB Dante.
creator: u/tekujuan

name: ✨Good Ass Job - Donda
description: Very creative rework of Donda using completely new beats heavily based on the production from Kanye's acclaimed College Trilogy albums.
creator: EndriBaku

name:
✨blonda
(with Frank Ocean)
description: Mashup album of Donda and blonde. Made by the same creator as "2049".
creator: Toasty Digital

name: ✨The Spirit Of Donda
description: Completely originally produced comp that turns a few Donda songs into sharper and colder versions of themselves. Contains a standout, absolutely gorgeous HaH edit called "No More" with a guitar running wild.
creator: braydo

name:
🌟Donda 2
(Beach House Edition / Deluxe)
description: D2 comp where BH-inspired production takes center stage, accompanied by warm vintage keyboards, guitars, and the iconic Linn drum machine.
creator: louiebag

name: ⭐Chicago
description: Community comp focused on bringing a finished, updated and expanded look into a variety of released and unreleased material from the Donda 2 era. Contains a great edit reconstructing and finishing Symphonic Blues Suite.
creator: ahmed2.0_ & Co.

name: Donda 2
description: Personal envisioning of Donda 2 that has been in development since 2022, making an enjoyable listen of the album without overhauls or AI usage.
creator: yigit!

name: WAR
description: Features extensive usage of AI to create a cohesive, reworked version of what an officially released D2 in late 2022 could have sounded like. Aims to flesh out the era and finish the album, while keeping the original vision.
creator: jambajuice

name: Donda II: Love Is War
description: Extensive and maximalist rework of Donda 2 by LuCas and other well-known editors in the community, revamping and completing the material of this era.
creator: LuCas

name:
Donda 2
(uhhjulian Edition)
description: uhhjulian's Donda 2 rework with vast production additions to each song. Home to an amazing Security rework. Outdated, unfortunately.
creator: uhhjulian

name: Donda 2
description: SimpleJosh's take on Donda 2, including several QoL edits that restructure the vocals to ensure the least mumble across the whole project and several production changes to improve the listening experience as a whole.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name:
Donda 2
(Rework)
description: Comp touching up D2 material to sound better and fuller while not having massive reworks. Sonically based heavily on the will.i.am produced tracks.
creator: Akimbo

name:
How Long Until Black Future Month
(with Future)
description: Reworked and revamped Donda 2 era Kanye & Future tracks with new samples, beats and structures, fully mixed and mastered.
creator: louiebag

name:
✨Let Her Go
(with Don Toliver)
description: EP-length comp combining tracks from the Donda 2 and LoveSick eras to create a cohesive collab project between Kanye and Don Toliver.
creator: Soup

name: ✨Donda 3.11 For Workgroups
description: Stylistic D2 remix that adds new original instrumentals while staying authentic (haha get it? im so unfunny send help) to the era and the creator's own style.
creator:
xav_authentique
(a.k.a. xav)

name: ✨8 AM // Donda 3
description: Donda 2 inspired comp with original production and verses taken from various sources or AI'd. Very inconsistent and was received fairly negatively.
creator: LuCas & tyson

name: ⭐WAR
description: Finished version of both Days Dissolve's IT'S WAR and louiebag's WAR, polishing and expanding upon material from both comps. Contains spectacular overhauls of several WAR leaks and entirely new song selections that still retain a sound that's close to that of the source material.
creator: Days Dissolve & Co.

name: IT'S WAR
description: Short but neat WAR imagining with songs from the WAR and Donda 2 eras, fully reworked to fit the spacious and tranquile vibe of this era.
creator: Days Dissolve

name: WAR
description: Scrapped community comp that was repurposed into Days & Co.'s WAR. Focuses on recreations and even original songs within its short length.
creator: louiebag & Co.

name: ✨Echoes Talking
description: Comp aiming to create a finished album inspired by the WAR era, using and expanding upon material from or related to Ye and Blake from 2021 to 2023.
creator: themusicnerdguy

name: ✨YESUKE
description: Overhaul of YEBU and VULTURES material in the style of JPEGMAFIA, borrowing influences from ILDMLFY to flesh out Ye's unfinished ideas via new samples, production and features and make it feel like a real album.
creator: themusicnerdguy
review:
Review - akis
Review - WR
Review - andrewfella
Review - Taco

name: ⭐Exiled.
description: Comp envisioning a cohesive solo Ye album set after V1 that is sonically more sample based and chill with change in vibes of each song edited.
creator: Soup & Co.
review:
Review - cometolife777
Review - vertie
Review - chrispo

description: Realistic rework of the YEBU era material with creative, polished and touched up edits that don't stray away too much from the original sound.
creator: louiebag & Co.

name: Y3
description: Comp that expands on the original sample-leaning sound of the era while adding verses and production to make the project as complete as possible. Has insanely good edits but also a few weird choices.
creator: andrewfella

name: GENESIS
description: Direct follow-up to Days Dissolve's WAR comp. Has its focus set on the sample-heavy, chill vibes from the era, using tracks from it alongside other Donda 2 and VULTURES songs that fit the scope of the comp.
creator: Days Dissolve & Co.

name: Y3
description: Lionel's personal take on a LP11 solo Ye album, polishing and fleshing out YEBU and VULTURES material to create a concise experience of the era.
creator: Lionel Scott

name: Y3
description: Sample based reimagining of the YEBU era material. Changes range from QoL touchups, demumbles, new verses, added samples and reproductions.
creator: angelo

name: YEBU
description: YEBU-inspired comp expanding on obscure VULTURES scraps with new verses and a spacious vibe. Not very accurate but still an interesting listen.
creator: rd48

name: ⭐Bad Bitch Playbook
description: Comp merging many aspects present in the ¥$ collabs' development phases in a cohesive way that makes for a complete experience full of bangers.
creator: m3lt

name: LIFESTYLE
description: Personal VULTURES take that attempts to make it actually good, with a focus on the pop-leaning songs of this era, turning it into a warm, concise and more lighthearted project inspired by the BBPB/early VULTURES sound.
creator: themusicnerdguy

name: Bad Bitch Playbook Vol. 1
description: Remake of the December 2023 Vultures TL. Contains a mixture of reworks and leak remasters to put together a finished and cohesive LP.
creator: Akimbo & louiebag

description: Complete transformation of the VULTURES 2 tracklist adding released and leaked V1 songs to make a "best of" album/compilation. Uses mixes from SimpleJosh's V2 Fix comp (check V2 era below) and new ones for V1 tracks.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: ✨Bad Bitch Playbook
description: VULTURES material re-envisioned with Memphis-styled production (along with other additions) to mimic the early barebones sound of BBPB era songs.
creator: vertie

name:
✨HEATHENS
(with Metro Boomin)
description: Reimagining of VULTURES material but prodded in the style of Metro Boomin prod (specifically WDTY/WSDTY), leaning heavily into the hard trap vibes of the era while still keeping the core of every song intact.
creator: DYL🅰N

name: ⭐VULTURES
description: VULTURES comp utilizing various V1 and V2 tracks, reworking and fleshing them out with production and structure changes for a more finished sound. The most concise and refined way to experience the VULTURES material.
creator: bloo

name: THE VULTURES PROJECT
description: Massive 41 track comp divided into 3 acts that encompasses most of the VULTURES material so far, with better mixing and other production choices.
creator: bobert, bryg, DASH, dev, noa & paci

name:
VULTURES 1
Akimbo's Cut
description: Akimbo's cut of songs from VULTURES 1 with a variety of QoL changes both in audio mixing/mastering and the songs' elements.
creator: Akimbo

name:
VULTURES 1
MJ REWORK
description: Heavily reworked V1 comp with new production, verses, overhauls and more.
creator:
MJTHEWAVEGOD
(a.k.a. MJ)

name: VULTURES
description: VULTURES comp comprising of everything from leaks and release songs (including bits and pieces of V2) creating a well rounded version of the album. Has plenty of QoL and production changes across the runtime.
creator: Lionel Scott

name:
✨VULTURES 1
Dropout Edition
description: Remix of the VULTURES 1 album, replicating the sampley chipmunk soul beats found on Ye's debut solo album, The College Dropout.
creator: TommyWiseau & Co.

name: ✨VULTURES
description: VULTURES comp reworking tracks into house and club banger remixes.
creator: NormalWorld

name: ⭐REPENT
description: Insane envisioning of a ¥$ remix album produced by JPEGMAFIA that was released in place of VULTURES 2, incorporating album tracks, features and leaks in very unique ways. Manages to capture JPEG's sound perfectly.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)
review:
Review - TMNG
Review - Akimbo
Review - ASMODEUS

name:
🌟VULTURES 2
(hc's Version)
description: Personal take on V2, containing reworks of its released songs, scraps and leaks from the BBPB era. Deviates off the style the released VULTURES albums had to deliver a more concise and enjoyable experience.
creator: hc

name:
VULTURES 2
DELUXE (Rework)
description: Rework of the released dumpster fire of an album with a variety of reproductions, restructures, audio polishes and straight up overhauls and remakes of some of the project's tracks.
creator: ahmed2.0_ & Co.

name:
VULTURES 2
V2
description: Full V2 rework imagining a more cohesive album that focused on spreading awareness about Ty Dolla $ign's brother Big TC and his wrongful life sentence. Adds tracks, production and skits reflecting this new tone.
creator: windybro

name:
VULTURES 2
March/April Version
description: louiebag's updated V2 comp, now focusing on making a realistic envisioning of the material made between March and April 2024 would sound like. Features various leaks and edits, all mixed and mastered by Akimbo.
creator: louiebag

name:
VULTURES 2
jambajuice's Version
description: jambajuice's personal cut of V2 with a variety of QoL changes in audio, structures, production and more.
creator: jambajuice

name:
VULTURES 2
Akimbo's Cut
description: Akimbo's cut of songs from VULTURES 2 with a variety of QoL changes both in audio mixing/mastering and the songs' elements.
creator: Akimbo

name:
VULTURES 2
FIX
description: Various QoL fixes and changes that don't stray too far from the release's TL. Some mixes from this were used for the "¥$" comp in the BBPB era above.
creator:
SimpleJosh
(a.k.a. Close Salami)

name: BACK OUTSIDE
description: EP-length comp dedicated to fleshing out the more obscure and underappreciated songs from the VULTURES sessions.
creator: Berais

name:
VULTURES 2
MJ REWORK
description: Heavily reworked V2 comp with new production, verses, overhauls and more.
creator:
MJTHEWAVEGOD
(a.k.a. MJ)

name:
✨VULTURES 2
Registration Edition
description: Remix of the VULTURES 2 album, replacating the orchestral sound of Late Registration. Features completely new, rearranged and reproduced beats.
creator: TommyWiseau & Co.

name: BULLY
description: Sequel to rd's YEBU comp. Reworks and recreates various songs confirmed or previously rumored to be for the album, leaning towards the sample-heavy and melodic vibes of the previews with as little AI as possible.
creator: rd48

name: BULLY
description: Short BULLY comp meant to improve the songs and tracklist without huge overhauls. Has no added AI on any edits, instead only acapellas from the BULLY V1 leaks and other songs from close eras by Ye.
creator: flashnardo

name: BULLY
description: Rework of BULLY filled with various additions and reproductions to known songs from the copy of the album with more songs added from around the era, all with entirely new custom written and recorded Ye-I vocals.
creator: martine

name:
BULLY
BEAT TAPE
description: Pre-release comp going through every BULLY preview and rumor to not only recreate, but further flesh out and expand on the project's instrumentals.
creator: UnoriginallyMad

name:
BULLY!
v2
description: Reworked of the "released" BULLY V1, featuring new drums, restructures and added verses. Very inconsistent but has its highlights.
creator:
[kanye wheat.]
(a.k.a. cartistt)

name: Glow In The Dark Tour
description: GITD Tour comp that while not exactly a 1:1 replica of the tour, has additions based on the tour versions. Essentially more like an extended Graduation.
creator: Orpheus

name: Live At Coachella
description: CDQ recreation of the 2011 Coachella performance.
creator: BSB Dante, Kuci & Matthias

name:
Watch The Throne Tour
(with JAY-Z)
description: CDQ recreation of the WTT tour material.
creator: Orpheus

name:
Yeezus Tour
From Fighting To Finding
description: CDQ recreation of the Yeezus tour.
creator: BSB Dante, Kuci & Matthias

name:
Saint Pablo Tour
(Redux)
description: A recreation of the Saint Pablo Tour while also having creative liberties to make it greater. Bases off the main setlist for the tour.
creator: Orpheus

name:
Watch The Throne Tour
In North Carolina
description: Up-to-date split and properly fixed audio of the listenable (lol) recordings.
creator: Orpheus

name:
Yeezus Tour
In Boston
description: Up-to-date split and properly fixed audio of the leaked Yeezus tour file.
creator: Orpheus

name:
Free Larry Hoover Benefit Concert
(Remastered)
description: Remastered version of the Free Larry Hoover Benefit concert. Only contains Kanye's section and has no crowd removal to preserve the live aspect of the concert.
creator: Akimbo

name:
Yeezus Tour Movie
(Remastered)
description: Remaster of The Kanye Archive's Yeezus Tour fan movie, ran through different AI stabilizers to get good results.
creator: GHOSTWLKAR

description: Mashup album made to be sort of an alt universe Kanye project. The songs put together come from all different eras of Kanye's discography. Version linked is the deluxe update released in 2021 that fixes some melodic issues.
creator: Toasty Digital

name: ClamYe
description: Mashup comp adding Kanye West over various Clams Casino instrumentals. Not era accurate.
creator: Zanthin

name: KANYE MADE TPAB
description: Kendrick Lamar's To Pimp A Butterfly, but all the vocals are from Kanye West songs.
creator: Spectre, Qo, & underdawg.

name: ✨Maybe We Can Make It To Christmas
description: Christmas-themed mega-mashup EP. Link includes the Patreon-exclusive intro while the link below it takes you to the recently released deluxe that adds multiple bonus tracks.
creator: Toasty Digital

name:
What's A Black Beetle
(with The Beatles)
description: Comp mashing up Kanye and The Beatles songs. Was featured in the Kanye Iceberg part 3. Was super popular at the time and had many interesting people working on it. Kanye may or may not have listened to it himself.
creator: DJ Troublesome & Uvemaster

name:
Yeezer
(with Weezer)
description: Mashup album combining songs from the discographies of Kanye West and the band Weezer. Received a lot of traction back when it was released.
creator: Alex Hodowanec

name:
✨Dope & Dreams
(with Pusha T)
description: Comp set in an alternate timeline where Ye and Pusha T made an album together. Most of the production is sample-based, combining Pusha's gritty feel with Kanye's soulful elements. Contains original beats as well as reworks of already existing ones. Multi-era, with main focus on Wyoming.
creator: Pupo Milan

name: ✨Donda TV
description: Collection of songs from Kanye's discography, now reworked with new sample-based instrumentals.
creator: pxblo

name: GriseldYe
description: Comp that reworks many Donda and Donda 2 songs to create a completely new tape in the same style as the Griselda Records, with new original beats. Spectacular talent on here.
creator: Edan, 00B36B & Kaan

name: ✨Polo Ye
description: Fanmade mixtape adding completely original lofi beats to Kanye freestyles. Notably made by a non-community creator.
creator: Cookin' Soul

name:
Skeletons
(with Travis Scott)
description: 7 track comp envisioning a collab EP between Kanye West and Travis Scott.
creator: Rose

name:
What Do We Want
(with Future)
description: 10 track Kanye and Future mashup EP. Was lost for some time.
creator: MochiAndBroccoli
